title: The Lost Lady
content:
You are the drowned,
    Star that I found
    Washed on the rim of the sea
    Before the morning.
    You are the little dying light
    That stopped me in the night.

    From the Arabic of John Duncan.
meaning:
"The Lost Lady" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
